prose:
Ethylene HOMO–LUMO gap — DFT single-point frontier-orbital calculation
Level of theory: B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard), no density fitting (exact integrals)
Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz` (.xyz; not optimized)
Solvent: gas phase (implicit only)
Charge/Multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet)
Software: PySCF via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill (engine_subcommand frontier); no version reported
SCF: converged in 6 cycles; no warnings reported
Results (Koopmans’ frontier orbitals at the DFT geometry):
  HOMO (index 7) = –7.6155818 eV
  LUMO (index 8) = –0.17986527 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 7.4357165 eV

Command (for reproducibility):
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/ethylene/ethylene.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --out ethylene_frontier.json >/dev/null 2>>frontier_<timestamp>.out
